texto: The death of this honorable man upon this battlefield leaves all of us the poorer for his loss, yet so much the richer for the friendship and love and loyalty with which he gifted us in life. May his spirit speed unhindered to the other side to join those already there and to await us until we join him in our own times.
explicacao: Citação de Walter C. Conner sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “The death of this honorable man upon this battlefield leaves all of us the poorer for his loss, y…” articula amizade, death, love em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como luto e termino.
